title: Sorcery JJK
description: A Jujutsu Kaisen plugin for Paper
body:
![Hollow Purple in shibuya, Map made by @Noshychan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6eadfa1cd75449b48379ba0f5b2dc7963aa1789d.png) # Jujutsu Kaisen–inspired abilities, built entirely with a plugin. This plugin is my attempt at recreating some of *Jujutsu Kaisen* abilities without requiring any mods. It works using only this plugin and a resource pack, which is automatically prompted when a player joins the server.
## What does this plugin add? This plugin adds **8 unique crystals**, all obtainable via the **/givecrystal** command. Each crystal grants its own unique abilities inspired by *Jujutsu Kaisen*.
## What are the features of this plugin? Currently, there are **8 crystals** that allow players to use abilities from the beloved anime, such as **Hollow Purple** and **Malevolent Shrine**.
### Available Crystals (via **/givecrystal**): * Crystal of Infinity * Malevolent Crystal * Restless Gambler's Crystal * Judgement's Crystal * Vessel's Crystal * Crystal of Ten Shadows * Brother's Crystal * Heavenly Restricted Crystal
### Cursed Finger An additional item available through the **/givecrystal** command is the **Cursed Finger**. When consumed: * The player gains the ability to see any player who has used the **/sukuna** command. * If the player has either the **Vessel's Crystal** or the **Crystal of Ten Shadows**, they gain a special Sukuna-related ability. * This ability allows the player to temporarily hand over control of their body to a **random player** who has used the **/sukuna** command. > **Note:** It is recommended to have **only one Sukuna per server**, though this is not strictly required.
## Commands **/sukuna**
Adds the player to the Sukuna list, makes them invisible, and disables their PvP. **/unsukuna**
Removes the player from the Sukuna list. **/unpossess**
Used by Sukuna players to unpossess their current victim. This command will not work if the victim is offline. **/givecrystal**
Gives the player one of the available crystals. **/disabledomains**
Simply disables the domains on the server. Does not transfer between sessions. **/grade **
Sets the player's points in the grade system. Will also unlock locked abilities **/bindcrystal**
Binds the player with one of the available crystals (can't be dropped or stored) **/withdrawpoints**
Simply withdraws points into a item. **/disableabilities **
Disables abilities for the provided player. **/infinity**
Grants the command user invincibility
## Permissions **sorcery.sukuna**
Allows use of the **/sukuna** command. **sorcery.unsukuna**
Allows use of the **/unsukuna** command. **sorcery.unpossess**
Allows use of the **/unpossess** command. Currently, this permission is mostly redundant, as any player possessing someone can use the command. **sorcery.givecrystal**
Allows use of the **/givecrystal** command. **sorcery.infinity**
Allows use of the **/infinity** command.

## Bugs and glitches Report bugs and glitches with the plugin through the discord server: https://discord.gg/QjH5gK7mP9
### Note: If your server hosting provider blocks the resource pack from going through, you have to set it manually in server.properties as a required resource pack through this link: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sorceryjjk
